title: Product Development Consultancy Intern
description: Contributed to the development of hemp-based protein bars and protein powders, focusing on nutritional quality, sensory appeal, and shelf-life stability. Led a team of three during ingredient selection, formulation trials, and product standardization activities. Participated in product testing, documentation, and optimization to improve consistency and market readiness. Gained hands-on experience in food product development while ensuring compliance with food safety and quality standards.

title: Quality Control Intern
description: Hands-on QA inspection across production lines. Conducted microbiological testing, maintained HACCP logs, and assisted in preparation for third-party audits. Reduced documentation lag by 30% through process restructuring.

title: Student Volunteer
description: Coordinated ABC drives and awareness campaigns across areas of Guwahati and other rural areas of Assam. Managed volunteer scheduling and created bilingual (Assamese-Hindi) educational materials on food hygiene.
